author: adversarial_suite
title: Abbreviations
body: Dr. Rao met Prof. Sen at 5 p.m. in St. Louis before boarding.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Initials
body: The report was signed by A. B. Clark and filed on Tuesday.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Organization Suffixes
body: Acme Inc. acquired Beta Co. and announced layoffs immediately.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Decimals
body: The sensor rose from 3.14 to 3.14159 before stabilizing overnight.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Version Numbers
body: We deployed build v2.3.4 at 10.30 a.m. without downtime.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Ellipsis
body: I thought it was over... but the alarms started again.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Quotes
body: She whispered, "Run." and then froze at the doorway.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Multiple Punctuation
body: You did what?! she texted, still staring at the invoice.

author: adversarial_suite
title: URLs
body: Please review https://example.com/docs.v2 before tomorrow morning.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Date Abbreviations
body: The hearing is on Jan. 5, 2026, in the U.S. district court.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Acronyms with Periods
body: The U.N. envoy met the E.U. council in Brussels yesterday.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Parenthetical Abbreviation
body: The reagent (approx. 0.05 ml.) was added slowly to prevent foaming.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Etc.
body: Bring eggs, milk, etc. and bread before 6 p.m. please.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Address Abbreviations
body: He lives on No. 12, Baker St., near the old mill by the river.

author: adversarial_suite
title: Quote + Ellipsis
body: Did she really say, "Wait... now!" before exiting the room?
